description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by landscaped gardens and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof with green spaces and skylights, and large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a central courtyard. At the heart of the property is a spacious outdoor area with a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and a manicured lawn. The bungalow is divided into multiple interconnected sections, including living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas, all oriented around the pool. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, complemented by wooden accents and lush vegetation. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, seamless indoor-outdoor transitions, and privacy within a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a central pool surrounded by landscaped gardens and open living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated corner, highlighting the central pool, surrounding lawn, and the arrangement of rooms around the courtyard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side elevation, emphasizing the flat roof, green rooftop areas, and the linear arrangement of the building's sections.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear perspective, showcasing the pool, sun loungers, and the open connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side elevation, focusing on the pool, garden, and the extensive use of glass and open facades.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors facing the courtyard
